perks.summary: initialize a new Arbor AO run — create the hypothesis tree + run config under .arbor/
render the Observe projection of current research state (read-only)
add a pending child hypothesis node under a parent (Ideate)
set a node's lifecycle status manually (e.g. mark running before dispatch)
write an executor's report (dev_score/result/insight/branch_ref) into its node (Backpropagate, leaf)
abstract a leaf insight upward to ancestor nodes / root global insights (Backpropagate, upward)
prune a falsified node and its subtree, recording the reason as a negative constraint (Decide)
record a held-out merge-gate decision against the test evaluator; promote M_best only if it improves (Decide)
increment the coordinator cycle counter and report budget remaining
render the hypothesis tree as an ASCII audit trail (read-only)
check hypothesis-tree invariants and report any inconsistencies (read-only)
